title: Peak Optimized
description: Why settle for lag? Play SMOOTH with us and immersive your game with FPS Boost!
body:
вЂЋ вЂЋ  вЂЋ вЂЋ  вЂЋ вЂЋ  вЂЋ вЂЋ вЂЋ вЂЋ вЂЋ вЂЋ вЂЋ  вЂЋ вЂЋ  вЂЋ вЂЋ  вЂЋ вЂЋ  вЂЋ вЂЋ  вЂЋ вЂЋ вЂЋ  вЂЋ вЂЋ  вЂЋ вЂЋ  вЂЋ вЂЋ вЂЋ вЂЋ  вЂЋвЂЋ  вЂЋ  вЂЋвЂЋ вЂЋ вЂЋ вЂЋ вЂЋ  вЂЋ вЂЋ   вЂЋ вЂЋ вЂЋ вЂЋ вЂЋ вЂЋ вЂЋ **Boosts** performance and Fps with **_Peak Optimized!_** 1.21+

![Peak Optimized Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a4db5ee80e5f0d4493b56efbb8de982a0cb7707.png)

вЂЋ 
> - вњ”пёЏ Lots of FPS with various new performance mods
> - вњ”пёЏ Optifine texture support
> - вњ”пёЏ Shader support with pre-installed shaders
> - вњ”пёЏ Server optimizations for increased render distance and smoother experience
> - вњ”пёЏ Quality of Life mods to enhance gameplay enjoyment
> - вњ”пёЏ Numerous bug fixes
> - вњ”пёЏ Open-source files
> - вњ”пёЏ Active development

вЂЋ


> ### About Peak Optimized:
> Experience Minecraft like never before with Peak Optimized, the ultimate modpack designed to elevate your gameplay to new heights. Boost your FPS with a comprehensive selection of performance-enhancing mods, ensuring smooth and seamless adventures in every corner of your blocky world. Dive into stunning visuals with Optifine texture support and immerse yourself in breathtaking environments with shader compatibility and pre-installed shaders. Say goodbye to lag with server-side configurations optimized for higher render distances and a smoother overall experience. Enhance your journey with quality-of-life mods, making every moment more enjoyable and convenient. With regular bug fixes, open-source files, and active development, Peak Optimized ensures that your Minecraft experience is always at its best. Embark on your next adventure today and discover the true potential of Minecraft with Peak Optimized.
